creator: jonathan.kirszling@runbox.com
text:
in latest 13.1, syncthing 1.22.0 has a known bug.
See
- https://forum.syncthing.net/t/all-of-a-sudden-lots-of-sync-conflicts/19148
- https://www.reddit.com/r/Syncthing/comments/yb0348/hundreds_of_syncconflicts_with_v1221rc1/
- https://github.com/syncthing/syncthing/issues/8604

Would you like to upgrade to latest version please ?
